title: PublicSectorDataset
description: A government-published dataset record. Aligns with the DCAT-US 1.1 metadata schema used by data.gov and the schema.org/Dataset profile. Designed to round-trip with CKAN packages returned from catalog.data.gov/api/3/action/package_show and with SODA dataset metadata from Socrata.

identifier.description: Stable identifier — preferably a URI or a UUID minted by the publisher. CKAN datasets expose an 'id' (UUID) and a 'name' (slug); use the UUID.

description.description: Free-text description of the dataset's contents, scope, and intended use.

modified.description: Most recent date the dataset was modified, RFC 3339.

issued.description: Date the dataset was first published.

rights.description: Free-text explanation of rights and restrictions when accessLevel is not 'public'.

license.description: License URI (e.g. https://creativecommons.org/publicdomain/zero/1.0/, https://opendatacommons.org/licenses/odbl/1-0/, U.S. federal public domain).

spatial.description: Geographic coverage. May be a bounding box, a placename, an OCD-ID, or a GeoJSON geometry serialized as a string.

temporal.description: Temporal coverage as an ISO 8601 interval (e.g. '2010-01-01/2025-12-31').

accrualPeriodicity.description: ISO 8601 duration or DCAT frequency code (e.g. 'R/P1D' for daily, 'R/P1Y' for annual).

landingPage.description: Human-readable HTML landing page for the dataset.

mediaType.description: IANA media type (text/csv, application/json, application/geo+json, application/vnd.ms-excel, application/zip, application/x-shapefile, application/xml).

format.description: Short format label (CSV, JSON, GeoJSON, Shapefile, XLSX, ZIP, XML, SODA, REST).

describedBy.description: URL of a JSON Schema or data dictionary for this distribution.

conformsTo.description: Standard or profile the distribution conforms to (e.g. GTFS, NIEM, FHIR).

bureauCode.description: OMB Circular A-11 bureau code (federal only).
